creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just tried it with a fresh install and it worked perfectly fine. What I did:

1) pkg install tor
2) modify /usr/local/etc/tor/torrc file by uncommenting control port and by generating a new hashed password using tor --hash-password mypassword
3) pkg install nyx
4) run tor
5) open nyx and enter mypassword
